headline: ₹100-400 Cr at risk over 3-5 years if global investor discount materializes — RBI's deferral of climate risk disclosure mandate delays sector-wide ESG transparency for banks
what_matters: BRSR, TCFD, ESRS, ISSB/IFRS S1 S2 frameworks remain relevant; no immediate penalty but future scrutiny likely.
Potential for P/E compression (5-10%) if investors penalize weak disclosure; margin impact deferred.
Short-term relief from higher cost of capital, but risk of FII outflow and bond spread widening if global standards tighten.
